items.title: Password not working
items.description: User cannot authenticate due to rejected password or repeated prompts.
triage_questions: Is this affecting only you or multiple users?
Are you seeing a specific error message?
Have you changed your password recently?
Is this happening on all devices or just one?
triage_steps: Confirm user identity and account status.
Check scope and impact per SLA definitions.
Confirm exact error wording and when it started.
Check for recent password changes or policy updates.
resolution_steps: If MFA is used, verify enrollment is intact.
items.escalation_policy: Escalate to T2 if reset fails or account appears compromised.
items.severity_guidance: Typically Low or Medium unless widespread impact.
items.impact_guidance: Determine if work is fully blocked or a workaround exists.

items.title: Account lockout
items.description: User account locked due to too many failed attempts or policy triggers.
triage_questions: Is this affecting only you or multiple users?
When did you last successfully sign in?
Do you have any old devices trying to sync?
Are there any recent password changes?
triage_steps: Check scope and impact per SLA definitions.
Confirm recent password changes and device sync issues.
resolution_steps: Advise user to update password on all devices.
items.escalation_policy: Escalate to T2 if repeated lockouts occur after unlock.
items.severity_guidance: Typically Low unless multiple users are locked out.
items.impact_guidance: Determine if user is fully blocked from work.
examples: Account locked after multiple login attempts
